lingala.calculate_your_carbon_footprint: Tánga elembo na yo ya carbone
lingala.get_below_2_000_kg_co_year: Kitá na nse ya 2,000 kg CO₂/mbula
lingala.try_all_3_scale_views: Meká ndenge nyonso 3 ya kotala échelle
lingala.design_5_fossil_energy_mix: Sálá mélange ya nguya na <5% ya mafuta fossile
lingala.get_ai_analysis_of_your_mix: Zwá analyse ya AI ya mélange na yo
lingala.set_5_detailed_habit_sliders: Bóngisa ba-sliders 5+ ya momeseno ya mokuse
lingala.commit_to_3_personal_pledges: Míkabá na bilaká 3+ ya moto na yo
lingala.export_your_climate_report: Bimisa lapolo na yo ya klima
lingala.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Tongá mélange ya bisilisi ya likambo ya 200+ Gt
lingala.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Zéro bobimisi! Makolo na yo ezali motéur ya mayi ya solo.
lingala.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Mobembo ya kokabola — pene 0.3 kg CO₂ na moyékoli mokomoko na mobembo mokomoko.
lingala.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Motuka ebimisaka ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Mibembo ya yo moko esangisamaka nokinoki.
lingala.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Kokabola mibembo ekitisaka bobimisi na moto mokomoko 50-75%.
lingala.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Mbuma, ndunda, mbuma ya bilanga, madɛsu — elembo ya bilei ya moke koleka.
lingala.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Mosuni moke, ndunda moke. Bilei ya kati.
lingala.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Mosuni ya ngɔmbɛ ebimisaka 60 kg CO₂ na kg mokomoko ya mosuni.
lingala.what_powers_your_home: Eloko nini epésaka ndáko na yo nguya?
lingala.near_zero_operational_emissions: Bobimisi ya mosálá pene na zéro.
lingala.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Réseau ya Amerika: ~0.4 kg CO₂ na kWh.
lingala.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Ba-réseaux ya charbon mingi: tii 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
lingala.what_happens_to_your_trash: Nini esalemaka na bosɔtɔ na yo?
lingala.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Compost ebalolaka bosɔtɔ oyo ebimisaka méthane.
lingala.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Kosalela lisusu ebombaka ~1 tonne CO₂ na tonne mokomoko ya biloko.
lingala.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Bisika ya bosɔtɔ ebimisaka méthane (makási 28× koleka CO₂).
lingala.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Motuka ya mafuta ya Amerika ya momeseno: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
lingala.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Kokabola motuka ya bato misato ekitisaka bobimisi na moto mokomoko 65%.
lingala.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Engbunduka ya kura ezali pɛto 4× koleka motuka.
lingala.ev_on_mixed_grid_25_km: EV na réseau ya kosangisa (25 km)
lingala.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Zéro bobimisi. Mpe litomba ya bokolongono.
lingala.short_flight_1_500_km: Mobembo ya mpɛpɔ ya mokuse (1,500 km)
lingala.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Mpɛpɔ ezali na bopusi ya moto 2-3× koleka kaka CO₂.
lingala.long_flight_8_000_km: Mobembo ya mpɛpɔ ya molai (8,000 km)
lingala.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Mobembo mokó ya molai ya kokende-mpe-kozonga = ~3 tonnes — mbula mobimba ya kotambwisa mpo na bato mingi.
lingala.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e na kg mokomoko ya mosuni ya ngɔmbɛ — likolo koleka na bilei nyonso.
lingala.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Mobimisi ya mibale ya likolo, sima ya mosuni ya ngɔmbɛ.
lingala.lowest_emission_meat: Mosuni ya bobimisi ya moke koleka.
lingala.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Ekeseni: salmon ya kobɔkɔlɔ likolo, cod ya zámba nse.
lingala.dairy_cattle_also_produce_methane: Bangɔmbɛ ya mabɛlɛ mpe ebimisaka méthane.
lingala.about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: Pene 1/10 ya bopusi ya bilei ya mosuni ya ngɔmbɛ.
lingala.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Madɛsu + loso + ndunda = elembo ya moke koleka oyo ekoki.
lingala.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Ba-kɔpɔ ya kobwaka ebakisaka ~50% na kotala oyo esalemi na ndáko.
lingala.food_waste_8_of_global_emissions: Kobebisa bilei = 8% ya bobimisi ya mokili mobimba.
lingala.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gaz ya bomoi: ~2 kg/therm. Kaka na eleko ya malili.
lingala.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Moyenge réseau ya Amerika; nse na CA, likolo na WV.
lingala.4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnace: Ya malamu 4× koleka four ya gaz.
lingala.10_minute_hot_shower: Kosukola na mai ya moto miniti 10
lingala.shorter_shower_linear_savings: Kosukola ya mokuse = kobomba ya mokoloto.
lingala.laundry_load_warm_wash: Kosukola bilamba mbala moko (kosukola na mai ya moto moke)
lingala.cold_wash_saves_75_of_this: Kosukola na mai ya malili ebombaka 75% ya oyo.
lingala.dishwasher_cycle: Cycle ya masini ya kosukola basáni
lingala.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Lapolo ya Netflix 2023 — nse na ba-estimations ya kala.
lingala.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e na prompt ya makomi mokomoko. Mituna ya contexte ya molai (1M token) esɛngaka ~3× koleka.
lingala.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g na elilingi mokomoko. Kilo 5–10× koleka makomi.
lingala.ai_video_generation_short_clip: Bosáli vidéo ya AI (clip ya mokuse)
lingala.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g na clip mokomoko. Ebakisamaka na mokoloto na bolai ya clip + résolution. Kilo 50×+ koleka makomi.
lingala.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g na clip ya mokuse mokomoko.
lingala.ai_code_assistant_completion: Kokokisa mosungi ya code ya AI
lingala.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: ba-prompts ya code ya contexte ya molai ~5g mokomoko.
lingala.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyester = bomoi mobimba ya kobimisa mafuta.
lingala.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Bomba ba-téléphones mbula 3+ mpo na kokitisa bopusi ya mbula na ndambo.
lingala.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Kotinda ya mikolo 2 = 3× ya kotinda ya malɛmbɛ.
lingala.shein_temu_avg_25_kg_per_order: Shein/Temu moyenge: 25 kg na commande mokomoko.
lingala.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Bisika ya bosɔtɔ ebimisaka méthane (makási 28× koleka CO₂).
lingala.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Eboyaka méthane MPE etongaka carbone ya mabelé.
lingala.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Mai ya robinet = pɛto ~500× na oyo etali bobimisi.
lingala.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Oyo moto nyonso asengeli kokóma na yango na 2030 mpo na kotikala na nse ya 1.5°C.
lingala.near_net_zero_mix: Mélange Pene ya Zéro ya Sɔlɔ
lingala.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Bingumba lokola Burlington, Vermont esalaka déjà na kura ya renouvelable 100%!
lingala.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Portefeuille ya ndenge na ndenge ezali lolenge ya makási koleka.
lingala.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Danemark ezwaka déjà 55% ya kura na yango na mopɛpɛ.
lingala.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Mokili ebakisaka ba-renouvelables mbangu koleka ntango nyonso.
lingala.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Ya kokíta mbula 10,000. Klima ya Holocène epai civilisation nyonso ya bato ekolaki.
lingala.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling abandaki bokɛngɛli ya ntango nyonso ya CO₂ na Mauna Loa. Courbe na ye emonisaki ete moto oyo bato basali ezali ya solo.
lingala.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Molukiluki ya klima James Hansen ayebisaki Congrès ya Amerika ete moto ebandi. 350.org etalaka 350 ppm lokola ndelo ya “bobateli”.
lingala.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Mbala ya liboso CO₂ ya mopɛpɛ eleki 400 ppm na mbula milió 3+. Eleko ya nsuka ya 400 ppm ya Mabelé: bazamba ya tropique na ba-pôles.
lingala.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Niveau ya sikoyo. Ya likolo koleka na ata mbula 800,000 (na ba-carottes ya glace). Ekokani na ~1.2°C ya moto.
lingala.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Ndelo esangana na moto ya 2°C soki ekobi. Mokano ya Accord ya Paris: kotikala na nse ya 1.5°C.
lingala.tropical_coral_reef_die_off: Liwa ya Ba-récifs ya Corail ya Tropique
lingala.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Makambo minene ya kobima mpɛmbɛ ya corail ebɛtaki Great Barrier Reef na 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, mpe 2024. Na moto ya 1.5°C, 70–90% ya ba-récifs ya corail ya tropique ekufaka. Na 2°C, 99% ekufaka.
lingala.greenland_ice_sheet_collapse: Bokwei ya Etando ya Glace ya Greenland
lingala.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Etando ya glace ya Greenland ezali na mai ekoki mpo na komatisa niveau ya mbú mètres 7 (23 ft). Na ~1.5°C ya kokoba, konyangwa ekómaka eloko oyo ekoki kozonga te na bikeke tii bankóto ya mbula.
lingala.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Circulation ya AMOC ememaka moto uta na tropique tii na Europe. Elɛmbaki 15% banda 1950. Kotelema mobimba ekokómisa Europe ya nord malili mingi wana ebebisaka ba-mousson na Afrika mpe Asia.
lingala.amazon_rainforest_dieback: Bokiti ya Zamba ya Mbula ya Amazon
lingala.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon ebimisaka ndambo ya mbula na yango moko. Na kokata bazamba 20–25% + moto ekomata, ezali na likama ya kobongwana uta na zamba ya mbula tii na savane. Ba-études mosusu elobi ete ndelo ezali pene na 2°C na motángo ya kokata bazamba ya sikoyo.
lingala.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost ya Arctique ezali na carbone mbala mibale ya oyo ezali na mopɛpɛ sikoyo. Wana ekomata moto 3–4× mbangu koleka moyenge ya mokili, ezali déjà konyangwa mpe ebimisaka CO₂ mpe méthane (makási 28× koleka CO₂ na mbula 100).
lingala.west_antarctic_ice_sheet: Etando ya Glace ya Antarctique ya Wɛsti
lingala.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Ba-etando ya glace ya mbú oyo ekangami na nse ya niveau ya mbú. Mai ya moto ya mbú ezali kolia yango na nse. Glacier Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) ezali likama monene. Bokwei ekomatisa niveau ya mbú mètres 3.3 (11 ft).
lingala.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Bazamba ya conifères ya nord (Russie, Canada, Scandinavie) ezali na mpasi na moto, ba-insectes ya lokoto, mpe mɔtɔ ya zamba. Mbongwana ya mobimba tii na matiti ekoki kobimisa carbone ebele ya kobombama.
lingala.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Kokoma moto ya mbangu ya Gulf of Maine
lingala.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine ekómaki moto mbangu koleka 99% ya ba-mbú ya mokili banda 1980 — pene 0.5°F na mbula zomi, pene 3× ya moyenge ya mbú ya mokili. Courant ya malili ya Labrador elɛmbaki wana mai ya moto ya Gulf Stream ekómaka na nord koleka, ezali kotonga lisusu réseau ya bilei na ntango ya sɔlɔ uta na moboko. Bituka ya libongo ya Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, mpe Mi’kmaq bakomaki mbongwana oyo na makomi ya monɔkɔ bikeke ebele liboso ya ba-satellites kondima.
lingala.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Kura ya ntalo moke koleka na mokili na 2024. Capacité emataka mbala mibale mbula na mbula na bituka mingi.
lingala.utility_scale_solar_farms: Ba-fermes ya Moi ya Niveau ya Service
lingala.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Kura ya ntalo moke koleka na histoire. Bosangisi réseau ezali mokakatano monene sikoyo.
lingala.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Ekaboli + makási. Bozongi ntalo ya système ya 5kW ya momeseno: mbula 6–10.
lingala.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 ya bilei ebebaka. Kopekisa kobebisa eboyaka méthane uta na esika ya bosɔtɔ MPE bobimisi mpo na kolona bilei.
lingala.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ezali 100% vegan te — ata kokitisa mosuni ya ngɔmbɛ 3× na pɔsɔ ezali na bopusi monene. Efungolaka mabelé mpo na kolona bazamba lisusu.
lingala.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Zongisá hectares 125M. Ebatelaka bofandeli ya ndenge na ndenge + ebendaka CO₂ na nzela ya photosynthèse.
lingala.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Loná esika bizaleli ya bomoi esungaka bokoli. Litomba ya kobakisa: kokitisa moto, kobatela etúká ya mai.
lingala.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Kokɔtisa banzete na mabelé ya koleisa banyama. Banyama ezwaka pió; mabelé ebombaka carbone 4× koleka esika ya koleisa ya polele.
lingala.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Kotimola te + milona ya kozipa + ba-rotations ya ndenge na ndenge. Etongaka carbone ya mabelé wana ebatelaka mbuma.
lingala.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Mabelé ya peat ebombaka carbone 3× koleka bazamba na mokili mobimba. Peat ekaukaki = mobimisi monene.
lingala.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: Ba-gaz HFCs ezali makási 1,000–9,000× koleka CO₂. Amendement ya Kigali (2016) ezali kolongola yango moke-moke.
lingala.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV ebimisaka bobimisi ya bomoi mobimba 50–70% moke koleka mafuta — ebongaka wana réseau ekomaka pɛto.
lingala.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Ba-engbunduka ya kura ememaka mokendeli-km na 1/10 ya bobimisi ya motuka.
lingala.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Bingumba ya vélo ya Néerlandais ezali na 1/3 ya bobimisi ya botambwisi. Ba-infrastructures esalaka ezaleli.
lingala.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Isolation + ba-pompes ya moto + mwinda LED. Bandáko ya Amerika esalelaka 40% ya nguya ya liboso.
lingala.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Ya malamu 3–4× koleka ba-four ya gaz. Esalaka tii −15°C na ba-modèles ya sika ya klima ya malili.
lingala.girls_education_family_planning: Boyékoli ya Bana Basi mpe Bobongisi Libota
lingala.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Mbala nyonso na likolo. Basi bayékola bazali na bana moke MPE bomoi ya bopusi monene. Esangisamaka na ba-génération.
lingala.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Ezwaka esika ya mɔtɔ ya nkoni/makala. Litomba: klima + kobebisa mopɛpɛ ya kati ya ndáko (ebomaka 4M/mbula) + kokata bazamba.
lingala.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Ekolaka 60× mbangu koleka banzete ya mabelé. Ebombaka CO₂ + ezongisaka mbisi + engrais.
lingala.other_waste_fugitive_aviation_bunkers: Mosusu (bosɔtɔ, kobima, mafuta ya mpɛpɔ mpe ya masuwa)
lingala.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Bobimisi ya Moke Mpenza — Ekokani na Paris
lingala.low_emissions_strong_action: Bobimisi ya Moke — Likambo ya Makási
lingala.middle_of_the_road_current_pledges: Kati ya Nzela — Bilaká ya Sikoyo
lingala.high_emissions_regional_rivalry: Bobimisi ya Likolo — Momekano ya Etúká
lingala.very_high_fossil_fueled_growth: Likolo Mpenza — Bokoli Oyo Mafuta Fossile Etambwisi
lingala.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Támbolá, salá vélo, to salá bisi kokende na etéyelo
lingala.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Meká bilei moko ya mosuni te na pɔsɔ
lingala.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Lobá na libota na yo mpo na baponi ya nguya
lingala.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Loná nzete to banda elanga ya etéyelo
lingala.write_a_letter_to_your_representative: Komá mokanda na momonisi na yo
lingala.start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Banda programme ya kosalela lisusu na etéyelo
lingala.organize_a_climate_awareness_event: Bóngisa likambo ya boyebisi ya klima
lingala.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Ba-raccourcis ya clavier: 1 tii 6 ebongolaka ba-onglets, Q ebongolaka quiz.
lingala.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Bimisa lapolo na yo ya klima na clipboard
lingala.hero_ppm: CO₂ lelo: ~424 ppm — ya likolo koleka na mbula milió 3+
lingala.mission_panel_copy: Longwá na ba-données ya moto tii na ba-preuves ya mokili, bosémbo, mpe bisilisi. Ba-laboratoires ya politiki mpe ya bopusi ya likolo etikalaka soki ofungoli yango.
lingala.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Libota ya moyenge ya Amerika ebimisaka ~16 tonnes CO₂/mbula. Ba-leviers minene ezali kotia moto na ndáko, botambwisi, mpe bilei — ba-pailles ya plastique te.
lingala.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Moi + mopɛpɛ ezali sikoyo ntalo moke koleka ba-usines ya fossile ya sika na ba-marchés mingi. Eteni ya mpasi ezali bosangisi réseau, ntalo ya bosáli te.
lingala.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Momeko ya ntango nyonso ya CO₂ na Mauna Loa banda 1958 — enregistrement ya mopɛpɛ oyo esalaka mikolo mingi koleka. Motindo ya mino ya scie ewuti na photosynthèse ya Hémisphère ya Nord.
lingala.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Bandelo epai système ebongolaka état mpe etikalaka wana — konyangwa ya Greenland, bokiti ya Amazon, bokiti ya mbangu ya AMOC. Mosálá ya sika elobi ete mingi ekoki kozala pene koleka ndenge bakanisaki.
lingala.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Bikólo oyo ebimisaki moke koleka ezali kokutana na ba-impacts ya mabe koleka. Klima ezali likambo ya bokokani liboso — bolɛmbu elandaka mbongo, géographie, mpe mokumba ya histoire.
lingala.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown etyaka 100 bisilisi na molɔ́ngɔ́ na gigatons ya CO₂ oyo eboyami. Ba-réfrigérants, kobebisa bilei, mpe koyékolisa bana basi ezali na likolo — oyo bato mingi bakanisaka te.
lingala.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Banzela ya Politiki ya Klima: campagne ya mbula 40 ya Maine
lingala.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Bomonisi ya graphique donut ya elembo ya carbone ya Climate Explorer ya interaction
lingala.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Bomonisi ya chronologie ya bobimisi ya Climate Explorer ya interaction
lingala.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Motángo ya bobimisi ya CO2 ya mokili ya mbula na mbula
lingala.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Ekangami na ~1.5°C ya moto ya kokoba. Ndambo mingi ya bomibongisi ya libongo ekoki naino na bifelo ya mbú, kozonga oyo ekambami.
lingala.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Esangana na ~2.5°C ya moto. Elongolaka bato koleka bitumba nyonso ya histoire. Mbonge ya mopɛpɛ ekómaka likama monene mpo na bituka ya kati.
lingala.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Ekoki na 2300 na 3°C. Bikólo mobimba ebungisaka mabelé ya kofanda. New Orleans, Venise, mpe eteni monene ya Vietnam.
lingala.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Elakó ya bikeke ebele na moto ya 4°C. Esɛngaka bokwei ya Greenland + Antarctique ya Wɛsti. Géographie ya libongo ya civilisation ya bato ekomami lisusu mpo na libela.
lingala.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Ekangami na Greenland + ndambo mingi ya Antarctique ya Wɛsti ebungi. Libongo ya moto koleka ya eleko ya Pliocène. Bikeke tii bankóto ya mbula mpo na kokokisa mobimba.
lingala.sea_level_rise_in_meters: Bomati ya niveau ya mbú na mètres
lingala.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — likebi: ~25% ya CO₂ nyonso ya histoire
lingala.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Mbula ya record — mpela ya Pakistan yango moko elongolaki ~8.2M
lingala.know_your_household_number: Yebá motángo ya libota na yo
lingala.welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Yambá bato oyo klima ezali koningana banda
lingala.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Tíyá mbamba ete elaká ya Fonds ya Bozangi mpe Bobebisi emata
lingala.read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Tángá mpo na bato oyo owuti koyoka
lingala.show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Bimá epai bikateli esalemaka ya solo
lingala.ipcc_first_assessment_report: Lapolo ya Liboso ya Bolukiluki ya IPCC
lingala.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Convention-Cadre ya ONU mpo na Mbongwana ya Klima
lingala.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS epesi likanisi ya Bozangi mpe Bobebisi na COP1 Berlin
lingala.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC ebandi kolanda bolongwi oyo klima esali
lingala.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Accord ya Paris — Article 8 elobeli L&D
lingala.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Ekateli ya UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
lingala.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Lapolo ya World Bank Groundswell Eteni II
lingala.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — Fonds ya L&D esalemi
lingala.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubaï — Fonds ya L&D epesami mbongo
lingala.first_l_d_fund_disbursements: Ba-versements ya liboso ya Fonds ya L&D
lingala.ipcc_1_5_c_deadline_target_year: Ntango ya nsuka ya IPCC 1.5°C (mbula ya mokano)
lingala.pick_the_biggest_impact_solution: Poná esilisi ya bopusi monene koleka
lingala.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Likambo monene ya politiki to ya klima ezali te. Mosálá ya politiki ya momeseno ekobaki.
lingala.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Okómaki na bolongoli carbone ya mozindo na bituka nyonso, otongaki bokási, mpe otyaki bokokani na kati. Boye nde kobongwana ya klima ya elonga emonanaka soki contrat ya lisanga ekangamaka.
lingala.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Bolongoli carbone ya monene na bituka ya nguya mpe ya botambwisi, kasi bomibongisi mpe bosémbo etikalaki sima. Ba-courbes ya carbone ezali malamu; coalition ya politiki ezali makási te.
lingala.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Bituka mosusu ekendaki liboso. Mosusu etɛlɛmaki. Bosungi ya bato ekitaki na ntango. Oyo nde nzela oyo ba-politiki mingi ya klima ya mokili ya solo elandaki.
lingala.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Bolongoli carbone etɛlɛmaki. Bopotalele ya bomibongisi efungwamaki. Bosungi ya bato ekweaki. Oyo nde nzela oyo tozali koluka koboya: ba-impacts ya klima esangana kozanga ba-infrastructures ya lisanga to ya technique mpo na koyanola.
lingala.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Bizaleli ya ebandeli ekoki kosalema. Kabola bozwi na bituka 2-3 na eleko ya liboso mpo na kozwa mibeko ya feedback nini ebandaka liboso. Boyékoli ya bato + ba-assemblées ya bana-mboka epesaka litomba malɛmbɛ kasi ya kokoba.
lingala.ai_climate_policy_reading: Botángi ya Politiki ya Klima ya AI
lingala.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Feedback ya malamu ekonzaka; Mabelé ekómaka moto na équilibre ya moto koleka. (Serre ya solo “oyo ekokamba te” — mbú ekotoka mpe ekóma mpepo — ezali scénario ya Venus, Mabelé te na ba-forçages oyo.)
lingala.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo ya likolo + feedback ya négatif. Nzela ya eleko ya glace.
lingala.net_forcing_0_w_m_earth_equilibrium: Forçage ya net ≈ 0 W/m². Équilibre ya Mabelé.
lingala.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Ba-forçages elongolanaka ndambo. Klima ekei malɛmbɛ.
lingala.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Schéma ya équilibre ya nguya: pole ya moi ya vague ya mokuse eleki na etando ya gaz ya serre mpe ekómisaka etando moto; etando ebimisaka infrarouge, oyo etando ya gaz ekamataka ndambo mpe ebimisaka lisusu na nse, ekangaka moto.
lingala.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Likanisi: Ntango nini albedo elekaka forçage ya GHG?
lingala.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Limbolá ndenge albedo, feedback ya mapata, mpe GHGs etambwisaka état ya klima esika moko.
